== できごと == * [[永禄]]11年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1568年]][[10月16日]]） - [[織田信長]]が[[足利義昭]]を奉じて入京
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[寛弘]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1005年]][[10月31日]]） - [[安倍晴明]]、[[陰陽師]]（* [[921年]]<ref>宝賀寿男『古代氏族系譜集成』古代氏族研究会、1986年、369頁。また卒年85歳（「安倍氏系図」（『続群書類従』巻第170 所収）による）とも一致する。</ref>） * [[貞享]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1685年]][[10月23日]]） - [[山鹿素行]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1622年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

revision.text:
[[sn:September 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 26일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿六]] [[zh:九月廿六]] [[en:draft:September 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|永禄}}11年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1568|ja|1568}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義昭}}.
== Births ==

[[sn:September 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 26일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿六]] [[zh:九月廿六]] [[en:draft:September 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|永禄}} 11th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1568|ja|1568}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義昭}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1005|ja|1005}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ） – {{ill|Abe no Seimei|ja|安倍晴明}} , the renowned onmyōji (* {{ill|921|ja|921}} )<ref>[[宝賀寿男]] 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * {{ill|Teikyō|ja|貞享}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Yamagata Sokuyuki|ja|山鹿素行}} , a Confucian scholar (* {{ill|1622|ja|1622}} ).

{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929}}

[[sn:September 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 26일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿六]] [[zh:九月廿六]] [[en:draft:September 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|永禄}} 11th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1568|ja|1568}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1005|ja|1005}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ） – {{ill|Abe no Seimei|ja|安倍晴明}} , the renowned onmyōji (* {{ill|921|ja|921}} )<ref>[[宝賀寿男]] 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * {{ill|Teikyō|ja|貞享}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Yamagata Sokuyuki|ja|山鹿素行}} , a Confucian scholar (* {{ill|1622|ja|1622}} ). == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929}}

[[sn:September 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 26일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿六]] [[zh:九月廿六]] [[en:draft:September 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|永禄}} 11th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1568|ja|1568}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長}} entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1005|ja|1005}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日}} ） – {{ill|Abe no Seimei|ja|安倍晴明}} , the renowned onmyōji (* {{ill|921|ja|921}} )<ref>[[宝賀寿男]] 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * {{ill|Teikyō|ja|貞享}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ） – {{ill|Yamagata Sokuyuki|ja|山鹿素行}} , a Confucian scholar (* {{ill|1622|ja|1622}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿六]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1568|ja|1568|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft|12=draft}} entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1005|ja|1005|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Abe no Seimei|ja|安倍晴明|12=draft|12=draft}} , the renowned onmyōji (* {{ill|921|ja|921|12=draft|12=draft}} )<ref>[[宝賀寿男]] 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * {{ill|Teikyō|ja|貞享|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1685|ja|1685|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Yamagata Sokuyuki|ja|山鹿素行|12=draft|12=draft}} , a Confucian scholar (* {{ill|1622|ja|1622|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|28|9|30|8|29|10|9|0929}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿六]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿六]]

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1568|ja|1568|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft|12=draft}} entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births ==

== Events == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1568|ja|1568|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 16|ja|10月16日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|12=draft|12=draft}} entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=draft|12=draft}} .

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月26日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の26日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[永禄]]11年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1568年]][[10月16日]]） - [[織田信長]]が[[足利義昭]]を奉じて入京
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[寛弘]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1005年]][[10月31日]]） - [[安倍晴明]]、[[陰陽師]]（* [[921年]]<ref>[[宝賀寿男]]『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻、古代氏族研究会、1986年、369頁。また卒年85歳（「安倍氏系図」（『続群書類従』巻第170 所収）による）とも一致する。</ref>） * [[貞享]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1685年]][[10月23日]]） - [[山鹿素行]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1622年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|25|9|27|8|26|10|9|0926}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840298]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 26|qq=September 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Genroku]] 11th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1005|1005]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ） – [[:en:Abe no Seimei|Abe no Seimei]] , the renowned onmyōji (* [[:en:921|921]] )<ref>{{ill|Toshio Hōga|ja|宝賀寿男|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshio Hōga|qq=}} 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * [[:en:Jōkyō|Teikyō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Yamaga Sokō|Yamagata Sokuyuki]] , a Confucian scholar (* [[:en:1622|1622]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Genroku]] 11th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1005|1005]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ） – [[:en:Abe no Seimei|Abe no Seimei]] , the renowned onmyōji (* [[:en:921|921]] )<ref>{{ill|Toshio Hōga|ja|宝賀寿男|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshio Hōga|qq=}} 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * [[:en:Jōkyō|Teikyō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Yamaga Sokō|Yamagata Sokuyuki]] , a Confucian scholar (* [[:en:1622|1622]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿六]][[zh:九月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840298]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 26|qq=September 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Genroku]] 11th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1005|1005]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ） – [[:en:Abe no Seimei|Abe no Seimei]] , the renowned onmyōji (* [[:en:921|921]] )<ref>{{ill|Toshio Hōga|ja|宝賀寿男|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshio Hōga|qq=}} 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * [[:en:Jōkyō|Teikyō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Yamaga Sokō|Yamagata Sokuyuki]] , a Confucian scholar (* [[:en:1622|1622]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Genroku]] 11th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1005|1005]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ） – [[:en:Abe no Seimei|Abe no Seimei]] , the renowned onmyōji (* [[:en:921|921]] )<ref>{{ill|Toshio Hōga|ja|宝賀寿男|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshio Hōga|qq=}} 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * [[:en:Jōkyō|Teikyō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Yamaga Sokō|Yamagata Sokuyuki]] , a Confucian scholar (* [[:en:1622|1622]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿六]][[zh:九月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840298]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 26|qq=September 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Genroku]] 11th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1005|1005]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ） – [[:en:Abe no Seimei|Abe no Seimei]] , the renowned onmyōji (* [[:en:921|921]] )<ref>{{ill|Toshio Hōga|ja|宝賀寿男|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshio Hōga|qq=}} 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * [[:en:Jōkyō|Teikyō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Yamaga Sokō|Yamagata Sokuyuki]] , a Confucian scholar (* [[:en:1622|1622]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1005|1005]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ） – [[:en:Abe no Seimei|Abe no Seimei]] , the renowned onmyōji (* [[:en:921|921]] )<ref>{{ill|Toshio Hōga|ja|宝賀寿男|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshio Hōga|qq=}} 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * [[:en:Jōkyō|Teikyō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Yamaga Sokō|Yamagata Sokuyuki]] , a Confucian scholar (* [[:en:1622|1622]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Eiroku|Genroku]] 11th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1568|1568]] [[:en:October 16|October 16]] ） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1005|1005]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]] ） – [[:en:Abe no Seimei|Abe no Seimei]] , the renowned onmyōji (* [[:en:921|921]] )<ref>{{ill|Toshio Hōga|ja|宝賀寿男|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshio Hōga|qq=}} 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * [[:en:Jōkyō|Teikyō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1685|1685]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ） – [[:en:Yamaga Sokō|Yamagata Sokuyuki]] , a Confucian scholar (* [[:en:1622|1622]] ).

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Genroku|1=Eiroku}} 11th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1568|en|1568|WD=Q6648|lt=1568|1=1568}} {{ill|October 16|en|October 16|WD=Q2963|lt=October 16|1=October 16}} ） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} entered the capital on behalf of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|en|Kankō|WD=Q2736722|lt=Kankō|1=Kankō}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1005|en|1005|WD=Q19231|lt=1005|1=1005}} {{ill|October 31|en|October 31|WD=Q2949|lt=October 31|1=October 31}} ） – {{ill|Abe no Seimei|en|Abe no Seimei|WD=Q1150151|lt=Abe no Seimei|1=Abe no Seimei}} , the renowned onmyōji (* {{ill|921|en|921|WD=Q30102|lt=921|1=921}} )<ref>{{ill|Toshio Hōga|ja|宝賀寿男|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshio Hōga|qq=}} 『古代氏族系譜集成』上巻, 古代氏族研究会, 1986, p.369</ref> * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|WD=Q1146221|lt=Teikyō|1=Jōkyō}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1685|en|1685|WD=Q7660|lt=1685|1=1685}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23|1=October 23}} ） – {{ill|Yamaga Sokō|en|Yamaga Sokō|WD=Q1095270|lt=Yamagata Sokuyuki|1=Yamaga Sokō}} , a Confucian scholar (* {{ill|1622|en|1622|WD=Q6815|lt=1622|1=1622}} ).
